question_summary: Set 050 S1: 11 design questions for schema-drift guard + number-prefix addressing
chosen_recommendation_summary: 8 of 11 dispositions changed: pure-JS hot-path drift scan (no router dep), manifest advisory/off-hot-path/declarative, --apply cut, extension number-resolver added, NNN- required for new sets. See verdict.md.

question_summary: Work Explorer simplification: plan/decomposition as session sets (P1), module management UI ops (P2), real Default module on scaffold (P3)?
chosen_recommendation_summary: Rework P1 into typed, repeatable session-set kinds (plan-create/import/revise, decompose/continue-decomposition) where the session set is the audited transaction and project-plan.md stays the stable artifact; ship P2 with delete-as-archive (completed sets immutable, slug-reuse guarded, state-based removal of untouched scaffolds only) and an atomic rename writer that restamps specs; ship P3 with a guided one-time migration for pseudo-Default repos and legacy root plans. Sequencing (atomic bundle vs P2+P3-first) is the one partial disagreement — operator's call.
fallback_reason: Operator-initiated design consultation; adoption/sequencing decision is the operator's.

question_summary: Round 2 (Sol adjudication): Work Explorer P1/P2/P3 contested refinements under a simplicity-at-a-premium criterion.
chosen_recommendation_summary: Sol (gpt-5-6) adjudication with simplicity premium: approve P1+P2+P3 as one atomic bundle; keep slug as identity (rename = preflighted all-or-nothing manifest+stamp rewrite; reject merges into existing history; no moduleId/tombstones/slug registry); delete = operator's rule (cancel nonterminal sets, remove only unstarted plan/decomposition scaffolds with no execution artifacts, completed sets fall to existing fallback group; re-adding a slug restores its history); no forced migration (legacy pseudo-Default keeps working, document manual/AI path); keep a small optional machine-readable `kind` attribute; block decomposition execution until planPath exists.
fallback_reason: Operator-initiated design consultation; adoption decision is the operator's.
